calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 first-class actor-critic action-learning ON/OFF validation (A0-A3 cotrain x SF-critic + bias_head control + local_view/oracle/random anchors; D0+D3; foraging teacher)
items.note: MECH-457 ON/OFF validation sanctioned by failure_autopsy_734-737-conversion-ceiling-competence_2026-07-11 as the next test after the actor-critic substrate landed (ree_core/action_learning/actor_critic.py, 2026-07-12). RPE teacher = FORAGING reward (user-confirmed 2026-07-12; substrate benefit-harm teacher NOT used -> no ARC-030 grounding phase). 8 arms: A0-A3 = cotrain_encoder{F,T} x use_sf_critic{F,T} + bias_head_baseline (724 all-ON incompetence control) + local_view_greedy (738 fair denominator, 48.05@D3) + greedy_oracle + random_walk. D0+D3 (x734 rungs), seeds 42/43/44, phased P0 warmup -> P1 A2C actor-critic (GAE; cotrain adds latent_stack to optimizer + live z_world, frozen detaches) -> P2 unshaped foraging eval. DV = capability_eval foraging_competence vs 1.0 floor, strict majority @D3. PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING: route to /failure-autopsy (accepts PASS target) before any governance action / MECH-457 promotion. deeper_than_action_learning self-route -> RE-AUTOPSY not a lettered floor re-test (734/737 RESOLVED_BY_FANOUT refusal stands). Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-12. Arm-fingerprint self-mint in-run (reuse-eligible, include_driver_script_in_hash=False); separate baseline mint SKIPPED -- first-of-lineage with machine_affinity=any (a cloud mint is not reusable by a Mac run and vice versa) + the OFF/warmup recipe co-evolves with the encoder under test; the free in-run self-mint banks all 8 cells for any strictly-later successor.

items.title: MECH-456 ecological rebinding -- world-driven PATCH-SET-FLIP test-bed (DESIGN + DV diversity for provisional->active)
items.note: MECH-456 provisional->active ROUTE (b): supplies the DESIGN + DV diversity the two prior PASSes (733b/733c) lack -- both rest on ONE teleport-based directed-traversal harness measuring a policy-INERT affinity readout (binder.binding_score). This adds (a) an INDEPENDENT world-driven productive-patch-set-flip test-bed (the WORLD moves the competing configuration, not the agent -- no teleport; decouples the overtake from foraging locomotion, dissolving the 733/733a coverage-starvation ceiling) and (b) an ECOLOGICAL behavioural DV on the POLICY-COUPLED couple() path (e2_fast.py:718/730/739 -> CEM elites -> committed action), the thing 733/733a could not reach. Two DVs, pre-registered: DV1 argmax binding_score tracks the true productive config above a config-label-shuffle control (reuse rebinding_functional_harness DV1 re-keyed to world-config regimes); DV2 live rebinding (ree_on) forages >= DV2_ABS_MARGIN=0.15 resources/ep more than a factor-FROZEN arm (binds once at episode entry). POSITIVE CONTROL (smoke-motivated): a ree_nocouple arm disables the coupling (strength=0); couple_authority=|foraging_on-foraging_nocouple| must clear 0.15 for a seed to be READY, else a null ON-vs-FROZEN DV2 is UNinterpretable and self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue/non_contributory rather than a FALSE inert-rebinding weakens (honours the claim's V3-EXQ-478 precedent: inert==inconclusive, not weakens). Dry-run smoke showed foraging_on==foraging_frozen==nocouple EXACTLY (gap 0.000) at toy scale, which is exactly why the authority control is load-bearing -- whether the couple() path moves foraging at trained scale is the empirical question. NEW EXQ NUMBER (new measurement class, NOT a survival letter): the re-derive brake FIRED on MECH-456 (2 non_contributory autopsies 733/733a) and REFUSED the P-A survival-onboarding axis; RELEASED here because this builds the named upstream substrate (a world-driven config-shift test-bed decoupled from foraging locomotion) AND is a distinct measurement class, not a 3rd survival letter. Does NOT supersede 733b/733c (adds design+DV diversity). A clean PASS (ecological_rebinding_supported) warrants provisional->active at governance; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING by itself (v3_pending gate). NO ree_core change (harness-level measurement + factor-freeze monkeypatch over the trained-then-frozen learned cross_stream_binder). Baseline-mint: NO separate mint -- the ree_on/frozen/nocouple arms are measurement contrasts over ONE shared frozen binder on a maturation trajectory (reuse-INELIGIBLE, flagged extra_ineligible_reasons=shared_frozen_binder_measurement_arm); the oracle/random calib arms are cheap + specific to THIS flip test-bed and are self-minted reuse-eligible IN-RUN (no lineage successor to bank for). claim_ids=[MECH-456]; experiment_purpose=evidence. Code-review + validate_experiments --strict --paths OK + dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (runs, all 5 arms, correct non_contributory self-route on the toy budget) 2026-07-12.

items.title: MECH-457 bias_head_baseline MINT -- order-independent reuse insurance for the V3-EXQ-742 OFF arm (724-A0 all-ON; D0+D3; baseline)
items.note: Separate baseline mint for the MECH-457 actor-critic ON/OFF lineage's reusable OFF arm (bias_head_baseline = 724-A0 all-ON incompetence control), banked ORDER-INDEPENDENTLY of V3-EXQ-742. Both this mint and the 742 consumer build the OFF cell + its fingerprint from the ONE shared module experiments/_lib/baselines/exq742_mech457_bias_head_baseline.py (run_off_cell + off_path_config_slice), include_driver_script_in_hash=False on both sides -> arm_fingerprint MATCHES by construction (verified: reuse-lookup key 4c316086... identical consumer-vs-mint). PINNED ree-cloud-4 (linux-x86_64-py3.10) so the fingerprint is the reusable cloud machine-class (a Mac mint would be a dead-on-arrival different class). LOW priority (5) so real science preempts. experiment_purpose=baseline, claim_ids=[] -> excluded from governance scoring; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING. A future MECH-457 iteration cites this run_id via reuse_baseline_from to skip re-training the byte-identical OFF arm. Corrects the parent session's initial wrongly-skipped separate mint (terminality unknowable; first-of-lineage is the paradigm mint case). Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-12.
